title: Verify Installed Extension Persists After Refresh

actions.description: Log in using admin@example.com and admin123 from prerequisites

actions.instruction: Navigate to the extensions admin page
actions.description: Navigate to the extensions admin page

actions.instruction: Wait for the extension cards to load
actions.description: Wait for the extension cards to load and be visible

actions.instruction: Verify an element with selector `.extension-card` is visible
actions.description: Verify an element with selector .extension-card is visible
